$comment: FC4 c2: runtime witness for the indirect-callee/arg-reg regalloc exclusion — the pools are drained so the callee's natural pick reaches the SysV arg registers; only the exclusion rule keeps the callee out of its own call's arg-setup clobber zone. fp is runtime-selected (recursion-guarded selector) so no pipeline devirtualizes the call. D15 cycle C: a `release` arm runs the SHIPPED release.pipeline.json ITSELF (shippedPipeline) — the self-recursive `sel` is exactly the recursive control-flow class RC-A/RC-B closed, witnessed here end-to-end under the shipped composition.
